name: WayChain
new_features: WayChain Mobile Wallet — added to feature chips, use cases, and footer
Energy Tide — added as branded product: feature chip, use case, footer
Feature chips expanded from 6 to 7: Mobile Wallet and Energy Tide promoted to first priority
Footer: Mobile Wallet, Energy Tide links in Connect and Use Cases sections
Mobile nav: header dashboard links consolidated into hamburger dropdown (≤768px)
fixes: SoT freeze: precompiles count reconciled to protocol-manifest (now 28 @ 0x0C–0x27, added 0x27 GasFaucet)
Address false marketing counts (20/21/22) in declaration/telegram/MARKETING
BIJO clarified as ecosystem reward token (not fuel token)
State rent pricing updated to match 2026 cloud storage costs
Whitepaper HTML restored (was broken/regressed in v3.1.1)
Navigation links for Binary Journal, TrustlessLock, DEX, Declaration now visible in header and footer
Precompile set grew to 28 (0x0C–0x27) with GasFaucet at 0x27
